name: coTfsSDOInit
title: coTfsSDOInit
syntax: long coTfsSDOInit( dword index, dword subIndex, dword ccs, dword expedited, dword sizeIndicated, dword notUsed, byte inValueBuf[], dword valueBufSize );
description: This function sends an initialization message for
The protocol is described in detail in DS-301.

parameters.name: ccs (client command specifier)
parameters.description: 1: download 2: upload, other values can cause unexpected behavior

parameters.name: notUsed
parameters.description: Number of data bytes that contain no reference data.

parameters.name: inValueBuf[]
parameters.description: Data field, at least 4 bytes large reference data assigned.

parameters.name: valueBufSize
parameters.description: Buffer size in byte of inValueBuf.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
